creator: skynyrd@opus.cts.cwu.edu
text:
I retrieved c2ps-30.tgz from both of the distribution sites and get a
checksum of:

	MD5 (c2ps-30.tgz) = a74d3be42da6b4b9a8c1e3ebabfe422d

which differs from the checksum in the port.
